name: review-anvil
description: Iterative multi-agent code review. Three cross-agent skills: review-anvil (engine — N rounds of parallel codex-exec/claude-exec reviewers, synthesize findings, optionally apply fix commits), review-anvil-readonly (engine with commit_mode=none), review-anvil-pr (engine + posts the synthesized report to a GitHub PR comment via a `set -euo pipefail` shell helper).
